parsedContent.feedback: Good effort, but not all properties of potable water are mentioned. You have correctly identified 'no color', 'no taste', 'no smell', and 'transparent' as properties of potable water. However, 'no color' and 'no taste' can be more accurately described as 'colourless' and 'tasteless'. You have missed 'free of germs/contaminants' which is a crucial property of potable water.
